guidance_notes: Pre-revenue. Faza: testy napromieniania w ATR (INL) na uranie z DOE.
notes: SEC 10-Q Q1 2026. Revenue $0. Op loss $7.68M (rosnie z testami), op cash burn $4.77M (~$19M/rok annualiz. -> runway ~11 lat). Cash $215.7M (wzrost z $201.9M przez ATM raise Q1; akcje 34.15M->35.1M), ZERO dlugu. Cash floor = $215.7M/35.1M = $6.14/akcje.
